meta.source: Real OpenSky live ADS-B feed — KJFK
meta.note: Real captured session from live OpenSky traffic (89 real aircraft). Conflict geometry is a short-term alert: ICAO dual minima (<3 NM AND <1000 ft) projected 120s ahead on current track — a projected alert for human verification, not a confirmed separation loss. Playback timing is re-sequenced for a smooth loop; no values are fabricated.

data.summary: EDV5161/UPS5306 projected 0.18 NM vs 3.0 NM ICAO min, violation now; 89 aircraft, 37/52 controllers.
data.recommended_attention: Critical separation loss between EDV5161/UPS5306 amid short-staffing (37/52) — immediate attention recommended.

signals.detail: 0.18 NM vs ICAO min 3.0 NM, first violation in 0 s.
